privileged_info_summary: The correct simulation results, when executed per the task instructions using the deterministic Bologna Pasubio scenario, yield an average duration of 491.27 seconds for the 150 injected 'moto_split' motorcycle trips, and an average duration of 381.56 seconds for all other trips.
